# PreVote scenario.
# A partitioned follower campaigns repeatedly. Without PreVote it would bump
# its term every election timeout, disrupting the cluster when it rejoins.
# With PreVote, the term stays put because the PreVote requests can't reach
# the cluster (partition) and the follower keeps trying without ever entering
# real Candidate state — its term stays at the original value, so when the
# partition heals there is no spurious leader step-down.

add-nodes id=1,2,3 voters=1,2,3 prevote=true
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0
INFO 2 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 2 became follower at term 0
INFO 3 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 3 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StatePreCandidate at term 0

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StatePreCandidate term=0 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgRequestPreVote from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=0 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgRequestPreVote from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=0 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgRequestPreVoteResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgRequestPreVoteResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1

# Partition node 3 (drop everything from/to it).
drop-msgs id=3
----

# Node 3 campaigns — it must enter PreCandidate, send PreVotes that get
# dropped, and never increment term to 2.
campaign id=3
----
INFO 3 is starting a new election
INFO 3 became StatePreCandidate at term 1

# Run a Ready so PreVote messages are emitted, then drop them on the way out.
process-ready id=3
----
> 3 handling Ready: state=StatePreCandidate term=1 commit=1

drop-msgs id=1
----
> 1 dropping MsgRequestPreVote from 3

drop-msgs id=2
----
> 2 dropping MsgRequestPreVote from 3

# Term must still be 1 (PreVote never bumped it).
status id=3
----
id=3 state=StatePreCandidate term=1 lead=0 commit=1 lastIndex=1

# Heal: messages flow again. Node 3 catches up as a regular follower.
stabilize
----

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1

status id=3
----
id=3 state=StatePreCandidate term=1 lead=0 commit=1 lastIndex=1
